attacking_style: Not an attacker but a fast finisher who arrives late in sprint scenarios, capable of contesting on both flat and rising finales with top-end speed.
team_tactics: Benefits from dedicated leadout support when available, though positioning failures suggest coordination issues or mid-race incidents disrupting sprint preparation.
terrain_preference: Versatile sprint finisher effective on both flat pure sprints and rising/uphill finales. Rising finales appear to suit him particularly well despite not being a pure sprinter classification.
vulnerability: Positioning and crash avoidance in chaotic sprint stages; completely absent from final on stage where leadout was present, indicating either crash involvement or critical positioning error.
key_patterns: Top-5 finishes in sprint stages including podium, demonstrating consistent speed (2 observations)
Can contest sprints on rising finales despite non-sprinter classification (2 observations)
Critical absence from prepared sprint finale suggests positioning fragility (1 major incident)
form_trajectory: neutral: Mixed signals with podium finish and fifth place showing strong speed, but complete absence from prepared sprint indicates inconsistency or bad luck
